title: Presch Screwdriver Set 7 Pieces - Magnetic Screwdriver Sets with Slotted, Pozidrive and PH Screwdrivers - Pro Screw Driver Kit
features: Universal - Our high - Quality screwdriver set is long magnetic and equipped with cross head - PH PZ - and SL heads so that you always have the right tools to hand when screwdriving.
Optimal hold - The non-slip grip zones of the Ergonomic handle help you maintain a firm grip and the extra-hardened head tip Safely screws every little or large screw in and out.
No rolling - The long screwdriver set remains reliably in place thanks to its hexagonal roll-off protection. Everyone will find their screwdriver where they expect it.
No searching - Whether, Pozidriv or the flat slothead - The tip size and style is indicated on every hand screwdriver. A big plus of our small screwdrivers set which saves valuable time!
Quality - The, the Pozi and and the slothead drivers are made of chrome vanadium steel and cuts a fine figure in every workshop box and every tool case.
description: Product Description PRESCH Screwdriver Set 7pcs. PRESCH Screwdriver Set 7pcs. Robust. Precise. Ergonomic. Discover our high-quality screwdriver set with Phillips and slotted screwdrivers. Precisely crafted tips for a secure grip and robust materials for long-lasting performance. Versatile and professional for all furniture and more screwing work. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. What sizes are included in the screwdriver set? The screwdriver set includes PH, PZ, and SL screwdrivers in sizes PZ1, PZ2, PH1, PH2, SL4.0, SL5.5, and SL6.5. With these various sizes, both cross-head and slotted screws are covered, enabling their use in different screwing tasks. Why is a non-slip handle advantageous during long screwing tasks? A non-slip handle prevents fatigue and allows you to handle the tool better. This makes it easier and faster when you have to screw for a long time. What is the advantage of a magnetic tip? A magnetic screwdriver is helpful because it holds small screws and parts. This way, they don't get lost. What makes the Presch screwdrivers particularly high-quality? The Presch screwdrivers are of high quality because they are made of chrome-vanadium steel. This makes them strong and durable. The handles are also comfortable and easy to hold securely. Why is a hexagonal handle better on screwdrivers? A hexagonal handle prevents the screwdrivers from rolling off on a work surface and allows for easy storage, making the handling and organization of the tools easier.
